- 2026-06-21: Fix YAML front-matter title format in 4.md
- 2026-06-21: add title
- 2026-06-21: 4
- 2026-06-20: zikken3
- 2026-06-20: Update pre_render.py to explicitly set sidebar titles
- 2026-06-20: zikken2
- 2026-06-20: zikken
- 2026-06-20: Add GitHub Actions workflow for Quarto publish
- 2026-06-20: Update markdown files to use YAML frontmatter for title and fix pre_render.py
- 2026-06-20: Fix markdown titles for Quarto sidebar
